Class DependencyGraph.SCC

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.proofmanagement.check.dependency.DependencyGraph.SCC
Enclosing class:
DependencyGraph
public static class DependencyGraph.SCC extends Object
Represents a strongly connected component of the graph. Note that for computing SCCs of the graph only termination sensitive edges are considered!

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    SCC(int id)
    Creates a new SCC with the given id.

    • internalEdges

      public Map<DependencyNode, DependencyGraph.EdgeType> internalEdges(DependencyNode node)
      Filters the edges starting from the given node to those where the end node is also inside the SCC.
      Parameters:
      node - the start node of the edge
      Returns:
      all edges of node inside the SCC
